content: Audit complete. All 4 components (Scheduler/fs.watch/pty.write Delivery/State KV) match scheduler.ts, activity.ts watchActivity (fs.watch+drain), terminals.ts (SUBMIT_BODY_TO_CR_MS=120, INTER_TURN_GAP_MS=220, userControlState, turnQueue), and state.ts (atomic mktemp+rename at state/<id>.kv). All 12 comm-* edges match real call graph including Scheduler->State KV and Scheduler->Conductor PTY. Edits needed: none. Flagged double-counting with Dispatch-Coordination: scheduler/activity-log/pty-orchestrator/conductor components there cover the same source files as comm-scheduler/comm-fswatch/comm-pty-write/comm-conductor-pty. See ARCHITECT/outputs/Scheduler-Harness.md.
